phases: Phase 1: Author-momentum risk score + auto-dispatch wiring

limitations: V1 risk score implements 2 of GH #82's 4 signals (config-cite, high-citation-surface); config-cite is a broad path grep that can over-fire toward Option B (the safe direction)
non_goals: GH #82 signals 2 and 3 (sealed-shared-module/new-field; analytics-emit/new-state-flow) deferred to a follow-on -- fuzzy plan-semantics, not honestly a lean text heuristic
the score does not dispatch a subagent itself, does not gate/VETO
exclusions: score routes solo-vs-Option-B only; /qor-audit is LLM-run, the Step 1 prose directs dispatch
